curation_notes: Locations derived from the patch diff. The patch modified a single source file (src/gateway/server/ws-connection/message-handler.ts). The clearUnboundScopes function had a condition (!controlUiAuthPolicy.allowBypass && !sharedAuthOk) that allowed shared-auth connections to bypass scope clearing. The handleMissingDeviceIdentity function called clearUnboundScopes too early, before the trusted proxy auth decision. The fix simplified clearUnboundScopes to always clear scopes and moved its invocation to after the proxy auth check, preserving scopes only for explicitly allowed Control UI connections.
